name: airtable
description: Use Airtable to create bases and schema, work with records, and organize team workflows through the Airtable app connector.

interface.shortDescription: Database and operations layer for your agents.
interface.longDescription: Airtable is the database and operations layer for product, marketing, sales, ops, HR, and custom business apps. It combines structured data with collaborative views like grid, kanban, calendar, gallery, and timeline. This plugin makes Codex fluent in Airtable through curated skills for Airtable concepts, filters, and CLI usage, plus the Airtable app connector for authenticated workspace access.
defaultPrompt: Set up a system to manage my team's operations.
Track my product roadmap, feedback, and releases.
Build a simple database for my project.
